login.headline: Welcome back to
login.tagline: Roll a number, pick a letter, spin a color, or throw the dice — decide anything together with friends.
login.noAccount: Don't have an account? Sign up

forgotPassword.headline: Reset your
forgotPassword.tagline: Enter your email and we'll send you a 6-digit code.

resetPassword.headline: Enter the
resetPassword.tagline: Check your email for the 6-digit code, then choose a new password.
resetPassword.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters.

register.headline: Create your
register.tagline: Build lists, randomize picks, and turn every choice into a game with friends.
register.haveAccount: Already have an account? Sign in
register.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters.
register.usernameTooShort: Username must be at least 3 characters.
